title: Living in Boulder vlog 6 - 16 - 2017: Buildings of Rome book

enrichment.summary: Kyle gives a casual daily vlog update from Boulder, covering getting a haircut, buying new headphones/earphones, plans to do car work at his mom's house, and mentioning he is working on an alphabetical book project he describes as being for his grandma, which he expects will take a long time.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: expects it to take a long time but is making progress
